summary: D11: deploy/guru-web.service — systemd unit verbatim from §7.6 (workdir /srv/guru-web/current, EnvironmentFile /etc/guru-web.env)
description:
Per §7.6. Working dir: /srv/guru-web/current. EnvironmentFile: /etc/guru-web.env.

DEPENDENCY (added by B6c, commit todo:77272cb5): unit MUST include
  Requires=ollama.service
  After=ollama.service
so Next.js doesn't start before Ollama (used for query embeddings) is up.
deploy/ollama.service is already shipped (created in B6c).
